args.code: (() => { const allText = document.body.innerText; const dayMatch = allText.match(/\u7b2c\s*(\d+)\s*\u5929/); const seasonMatch = allText.match(/(\u6625|\u590f|\u79cb|\u51ac)\u5b63/); const moneyMatch = allText.match(/💰\s*([\d,]+)/); const staminaMatch = allText.match(/⚡\s*(\d+)\s*\/\s*(\d+)/); const healthMatch = allText.match(/❤️\s*(\d+)\s*\/\s*(\d+)/); const riceMatch = allText.match(/\u6c34\u7a3b[：:]\s*([\d,]+)/); const sweetMatch = allText.match(/\u7ea2\u85af[：:]\s*([\d,]+)/); const fieldMatch = allText.match(/\u7530\u5730[：:]\s*(\d+)/); const logEntries = allText.match(/\[\u7b2c\d+\u5929\][^\n]*/g); const lastLogs = logEntries ? logEntries.slice(-5) : []; return JSON.stringify({day: dayMatch ? dayMatch[1] : null, season: seasonMatch ? seasonMatch[1] : null, money: moneyMatch ? moneyMatch[1] : null, stamina: staminaMatch ? staminaMatch[1]+'/'+staminaMatch[2] : null, health: healthMatch ? healthMatch[1]+'/'+healthMatch[2] : null, rice: riceMatch ? riceMatch[1] : null, sweet: sweetMatch ? sweetMatch[1] : null, fieldCount: fieldMatch ? fieldMatch[1] : null, lastLogs: lastLogs}); })()
